title: ehretia cymosa var. breviflora
intro: Ehretia cymosa var. breviflora, also known as the Short-flowered Ehretia, is a plant species in the Ehretia genus, native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which contains compounds that have been traditionally used to treat fever, inflammation, and skin conditions. The health benefits associated with Ehretia cymosa var. breviflora include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in wound healing and reducing swelling. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
